# Mnguni Project

> South African document agent based in Pretoria, specialising in police clearances, unabridged marriage certificates, and HPCSH submissions for the Korea and China teaching market. Real-time tracking with photographic proof at every government stage.

## About

Mnguni Project handles the full documentation chain for South Africans seeking teaching contracts in Korea and China. We physically queue at Home Affairs, SAPS, High Court, and Chinese/Korean Embassies — photographing every step so you know exactly where your documents stand without phone calls.

## Core Services

- [Police Clearance](https://mnguniproject.co.za): Full application and collection with photographic proof of submission
- [Unabridged Marriage Certificate](https://mnguniproject.co.za): Home Affairs application, apostille at High Court, Korean Embassy submission
- [HPCSH (Health Practitioner Council)](https://mnguniproject.co.za): Registration and qualification verification for healthcare professionals
- [Embassy Submissions](https://mnguniproject.co.za): Korean Embassy (Pretoria) and Chinese Visa Application Centre (Johannesburg) document submissions
- [Courier & Return](https://mnguniproject.co.za): Secure DHL/EMS dispatch to Korea, China, or anywhere globally

## Location

Based in Pretoria, Gauteng. We serve clients throughout:
- Pretoria and Centurion
- Johannesburg (Sandton, Rosebank, CBD)
- Nationwide via courier for remote clients

## Why Choose Mnguni Project

- Local Knowledge: Deep understanding of South African municipal regulations and SANS building codes
- Transparent Pricing: Detailed quotes with no hidden costs
- Timeline Guarantee: Structured document schedules with regular photo updates
- No Physical Presence Required: We handle all queuing, submissions, and collections
- Real-time Updates: WhatsApp photo updates at every government counter

## Contact

- Phone: +27 60 774 6860
- Email: mpumi.mfeka@gmail.com
- Hours: Monday–Friday 08:00–16:00
- Website: https://mnguniproject.co.za

## Typical Timeline

- Police Clearance: 10–15 working days
- Unabridged Marriage Certificate + Apostille: 4–8 weeks
- Full E2 Visa Package (Korea): 6–10 weeks
- Full Z Visa Package (China): 8–12 weeks

## Available For

- Individual teachers seeking E2/Z visas
- Recruitment agencies needing batch processing
- Universities and institutions requiring staff documentation
- Remote consultations available for out-of-province clients
